name: Metro Loft Hotels
tagline: Design-led boutique stays in the heart of the city
description: Metro Loft Hotels are neighborhood-first boutique properties carved out of reimagined warehouses. Exposed brick, custom-built furniture, cocktail programs worth crossing town for.

home.heroSubhead: Seven boutique properties. Zero cookie-cutter rooms.
home.bookingSubhead: Same-day availability always live — plus rates for a weekend you haven't planned yet.

amenities.heading: The Essentials, Done Properly
amenities.intro: We'd rather do a few things well than list twenty that don't matter.

items.label: Rooftop Cocktail Bar
items.description: On the 14th floor, open to the public until 1am

items.label: Ground-Floor Restaurant
items.description: Seasonal small plates by Chef Mira Tan

items.label: Fitness Studio
items.description: Peloton, free weights, and classes twice daily

items.label: Valet Parking
items.description: Keep the keys, we'll bring the car
